auth.label: App ID
auth.description: OpenGraph.io App ID sent as the app_id query parameter. Get it from the OpenGraph.io dashboard as described at https://www.opengraph.io/docs/concepts/auth.

actions.name: capture_screenshot
actions.description: Capture a webpage screenshot through the OpenGraph.io Screenshot endpoint with configurable viewport, delay, and element selection.

url.description: The page URL to capture as an image.

cacheOk.description: Whether cached screenshots may be returned when available.

selector.description: An optional CSS selector that limits the capture to a specific element.

darkMode.description: Whether the page should be rendered with a dark color-scheme preference.

fullPage.description: Whether the entire scrollable page should be captured.

useProxy.description: Whether a proxy should be used for the request.

captureDelay.description: The delay in milliseconds before taking the screenshot.

excludeSelectors.description: Comma-separated CSS selectors for elements that should be hidden.

blockCookieBanner.description: Whether known cookie consent banners should be blocked.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for capturing a screenshot with OpenGraph.io.

screenshotUrl.description: The URL of the generated screenshot image.

dimensions.description: The dimensions of the captured screenshot.

host.description: The host that responded to the request.

redirects.description: The number of redirects followed while fetching the URL.

responseCode.description: The HTTP response code returned upstream.

responseContentType.description: The upstream response Content-Type header when available.

requestInfo.description: Information about the upstream request performed by OpenGraph.io.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload returned by the OpenGraph.io Screenshot endpoint.

actions.name: extract_site
actions.description: Extract Open Graph, Twitter Card, oEmbed, and inferred metadata for a site through the OpenGraph.io Site endpoint.

cacheOk.description: Whether cached results may be returned when available.

fullRender.description: Whether the page should be rendered in a browser before extraction.

useProxy.description: Whether a proxy should be used for the request.

usePremium.description: Whether a residential proxy should be used when available.

useSuperior.description: Whether a mobile-grade proxy should be used when available.

useAi.description: Whether AI-enhanced metadata extraction should be enabled.

maxCacheAge.description: The maximum accepted cache age in seconds.

acceptLang.description: The Accept-Language header value sent to the target site.

autoProxy.description: Whether OpenGraph.io may automatically decide whether to use a proxy.

autoRender.description: Whether OpenGraph.io may automatically decide whether full rendering is needed.

retry.description: Whether OpenGraph.io should retry with fallback transport strategies.

maxRetries.description: The maximum number of retry attempts.

retryEscalate.description: Whether retries may escalate to more expensive fallback strategies.

proxyCountry.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to use for proxy egress.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for extracting OpenGraph.io site metadata.

hybridGraph.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

openGraph.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

twitterCard.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

htmlInferred.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

oEmbed.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

requestUrl.description: The final URL that OpenGraph.io resolved after redirects.

host.description: The host that responded to the request.

redirects.description: The number of redirects followed while fetching the URL.

responseCode.description: The HTTP response code returned upstream.

responseContentType.description: The upstream response Content-Type header when available.

requestInfo.description: Information about the upstream request performed by OpenGraph.io.

cached.description: Whether the result came from cache.

anyOf.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the cached result was created.

retryInfo.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

aiSafety.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

domain.description: The domain extracted from the requested URL.

items.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

tags.description: Additional tag-level extraction results when returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized metadata payload returned by the OpenGraph.io Site endpoint.

actions.name: scrape_site
actions.description: Retrieve a site's metadata through the OpenGraph.io Site endpoint with cache, proxy, render, and retry controls.

cacheOk.description: Whether cached results may be returned when available.

fullRender.description: Whether the page should be rendered in a browser before extraction.

useProxy.description: Whether a proxy should be used for the request.

usePremium.description: Whether a residential proxy should be used when available.

useSuperior.description: Whether a mobile-grade proxy should be used when available.

useAi.description: Whether AI-enhanced metadata extraction should be enabled.

maxCacheAge.description: The maximum accepted cache age in seconds.

acceptLang.description: The Accept-Language header value sent to the target site.

autoProxy.description: Whether OpenGraph.io may automatically decide whether to use a proxy.

autoRender.description: Whether OpenGraph.io may automatically decide whether full rendering is needed.

retry.description: Whether OpenGraph.io should retry with fallback transport strategies.

maxRetries.description: The maximum number of retry attempts.

retryEscalate.description: Whether retries may escalate to more expensive fallback strategies.

proxyCountry.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to use for proxy egress.

scrape.description: A reserved compatibility flag. The current official Site endpoint does not expose a separate scrape mode, so this value is ignored.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving OpenGraph.io site metadata.

hybridGraph.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

openGraph.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

twitterCard.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

htmlInferred.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

oEmbed.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

requestUrl.description: The final URL that OpenGraph.io resolved after redirects.

host.description: The host that responded to the request.

redirects.description: The number of redirects followed while fetching the URL.

responseCode.description: The HTTP response code returned upstream.

responseContentType.description: The upstream response Content-Type header when available.

requestInfo.description: Information about the upstream request performed by OpenGraph.io.

cached.description: Whether the result came from cache.

anyOf.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the cached result was created.

retryInfo.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

aiSafety.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

domain.description: The domain extracted from the requested URL.

items.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

tags.description: Additional tag-level extraction results when returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized metadata payload returned by the OpenGraph.io Site endpoint.

actions.name: scrape_url
actions.description: Fetch the raw HTML for a page through the OpenGraph.io Scrape endpoint with optional render and proxy controls.

url.description: The page URL to scrape for raw HTML.

cacheOk.description: Whether cached results may be returned when available.

fullRender.description: Whether the page should be rendered in a browser before scraping.

useProxy.description: Whether a proxy should be used for the request.

usePremium.description: Whether a residential proxy should be used when available.

useSuperior.description: Whether a mobile-grade proxy should be used when available.

acceptLang.description: The Accept-Language header value sent to the target site.

autoProxy.description: Whether OpenGraph.io may automatically decide whether to use a proxy.

autoRender.description: Whether OpenGraph.io may automatically decide whether full rendering is needed.

retry.description: Whether OpenGraph.io should retry with fallback transport strategies.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for scraping a URL with OpenGraph.io.

htmlContent.description: The raw HTML content returned for the page.

host.description: The host that responded to the request.

redirects.description: The number of redirects followed while fetching the URL.

responseCode.description: The HTTP response code returned upstream.

responseContentType.description: The upstream response Content-Type header when available.

requestInfo.description: Information about the upstream request performed by OpenGraph.io.

retryInfo.description: A loose JSON object returned by OpenGraph.io.

outputSchema.description: The normalized output payload returned by the OpenGraph.io Scrape endpoint.
